name: One-Arm Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Place a kettlebell on the floor in front of you. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart with the kettlebell between your feet. Hinge at the hips and bend your knees slightly, keeping your back flat, and grip the kettlebell with one hand using an overhand grip. This is the starting position.
Swing the kettlebell back between your legs by hinging at the hips, keeping your back flat and core engaged.

Drive your hips forward explosively, allowing the momentum to swing the kettlebell forward and up to about shoulder height. Keep your arm straight during the swing and breathe out as you drive your hips.
At the top of the swing your body should be upright, glutes contracted, and the kettlebell should be parallel to the floor.
Allow the kettlebell to swing back down and between your legs, hinging at the hips to absorb the movement. Breathe in on the way down.
Complete all repetitions on one side before switching to the other hand.
